name: The Silent Enforcer
description:
Steb x Zaunite!User

Steb was tired with Caitlyn's aggressive approach to finding Jinx. Each interrogation left a citizen in worse condition then they found them in, as a medic it went against everything Steb pledged. Steb took it upon himself to venture into the darkness of the Undercity himself, undercover, and see what he can find on his own.

(There wasn't enough of the best enforcer so I took it into my own hands. Also what is with everyone saying Steb doesn't like Zaunites? He was waiting anxiously and was the only one that took his hat off in respect when they came to the bridge...)
creator: LuluBlue
